features.name: Multilingual Chat
features.description: Core chat functionality. User sends message, WISDOM responds in user's language with streaming output.
acceptance_criteria: User can send text messages and receive responses
Responses stream in real-time (token by token)
Conversation history maintained within session (last 20 messages)
Works with both Ollama and Gemini backends
features.user_story: As a first-time AI user, I want to chat with WISDOM in my own language so that I can understand and interact naturally.

features.name: Auto Language Detection
features.description: Automatically detect the user's language from their first message and set it as default. Support 10+ languages.
acceptance_criteria: Detects Thai, English, Hindi, Spanish, Chinese, Arabic, Portuguese, Swahili, Indonesian, French
Detection accuracy > 95% for messages with 5+ words
Language stored in user profile and persisted
User can manually override detected language
features.user_story: As a Thai speaker, I want WISDOM to automatically detect that I'm writing in Thai so I don't have to configure language settings.

features.name: User Profile System
features.description: Create and manage user profiles with name, language, skill level, interests, and preferences. Stored in local SQLite.
acceptance_criteria: New users get a profile created on first interaction
Profile includes: name, language, skill_level, interests, goals, preferences
Profile can be exported as JSON
Profile can be deleted (right to be forgotten)
features.user_story: As a returning user, I want WISDOM to remember my name and preferences so I don't have to repeat myself.

features.name: Conversation Memory (Short-term)
features.description: Maintain conversation history within a session. Last 20 messages sent as context to LLM for coherent multi-turn conversation.
acceptance_criteria: Context window managed to stay within LLM token limits
Older messages summarized before being dropped
Session history saved to SQLite on session end
features.user_story: As a user, I want WISDOM to remember what we discussed earlier in our conversation so I don't have to repeat context.

features.name: Dual LLM Backend
features.description: LLM abstraction layer with Ollama (local, free) as primary and Gemini 2.0 Flash (cloud, free tier) as fallback. Auto-detection and seamless switching.
acceptance_criteria: Auto-detects if Ollama is running on localhost:11434
Falls back to Gemini if Ollama unavailable
Health check endpoint reports current provider
Works with zero configuration (env vars optional)
features.user_story: As a developer deploying WISDOM, I want it to automatically use the best available LLM so I don't have to configure anything.

features.name: Streamlit Chat Interface
features.description: Clean, modern chat interface built with Streamlit. Mobile-friendly, dark theme, minimal UI. First-time user should understand it immediately.
acceptance_criteria: Chat bubble UI (user right, WISDOM left)
Sidebar with user info and quick actions
features.user_story: As a non-technical user, I want a simple and beautiful chat interface that I can understand without instructions.

features.name: Welcome & Onboarding Flow
features.description: First-time user experience. WISDOM introduces itself, asks name, detects language, offers choices (Learn/Chat/Help). Warm and inviting.
acceptance_criteria: Auto-triggered for new users (no profile found)
Offers 3 paths: Learn about AI / Just Chat / Help me with something
features.user_story: As someone who has never used AI before, I want a friendly welcome that guides me through my first interaction.

features.name: Long-term Memory (Vector Store)
features.description: Persist important facts and conversation summaries to ChromaDB vector store. Retrieve relevant context for future conversations using RAG.
acceptance_criteria: Important facts extracted and stored as embeddings
Conversation summaries generated on session end
RAG retrieval: top 5 relevant memories per query
Works with local embeddings (nomic-embed-text via Ollama)
Falls back to Gemini embeddings if Ollama unavailable
Memory size manageable (auto-prune old, low-relevance entries)
features.user_story: As a returning user, I want WISDOM to remember what we discussed last week so our conversation builds on previous context.

features.name: Knowledge Graph
features.description: Personal knowledge graph storing user-topic-goal relationships. Neo4j Aura (free tier) with SQLite fallback for offline use.
acceptance_criteria: Works with Neo4j Aura free tier
Falls back to SQLite-based graph if Neo4j unavailable
Graph traversal for learning path recommendations
features.user_story: As a user, I want WISDOM to understand the connections between what I've learned so it can recommend what to study next.

features.name: Skill Assessment
features.description: 5-question adaptive assessment to determine user's AI knowledge level (0-10 scale). Categories: AI Awareness, Prompt Skills, Digital Literacy, Coding, Domain Knowledge.
acceptance_criteria: 5 adaptive questions (next question based on previous answer)
Composite skill level calculated with weighted average
Questions available in all supported languages
features.user_story: As a new user, I want WISDOM to understand my current knowledge level so it can teach me at the right pace.

features.name: Learning Path (Level 1-3)
features.description: Structured learning modules: L1 (What is AI?), L2 (Talking to AI), L3 (AI in Daily Life). Each module has lessons, exercises, and quizzes.
acceptance_criteria: Each module: 3-4 lessons, interactive exercises, quiz
Content adapts to user's language and context
Quiz scoring with pass/fail (70% to pass)
Content uses real-life examples relevant to user's interests
features.user_story: As a beginner, I want a structured path to learn about AI step by step so I don't feel overwhelmed.

features.name: Tone & Complexity Adaptation
features.description: Automatically adapt WISDOM's response style based on user signals. Detect confusion, excitement, boredom. Adjust formality and technical depth.
acceptance_criteria: Detect user skill level from message patterns
Adapt vocabulary complexity to match user
Formal/casual mode based on user's style
Changes reflected in system prompt dynamically
features.user_story: As a user who gets confused easily, I want WISDOM to automatically simplify its explanations when I'm struggling.

features.name: Progress Dashboard
features.description: Visual dashboard showing learning progress, skill radar chart, achievements, and conversation statistics.
features.user_story: As a learner, I want to see my progress visually so I feel motivated to continue.

features.name: Learning Path (Level 4-5)
features.description: Advanced learning modules: L4 (How AI Thinks), L5 (Code with AI). Teaching understanding and introductory coding with AI assistance.
acceptance_criteria: L4: AI internals explained simply (tokens, training, bias)
L5: First Python program with WISDOM guidance
Adapted to user's language and interests
features.user_story: As an intermediate user, I want to understand how AI works and start learning to code with AI's help.

features.name: Goal Setting & Tracking
features.description: Users set personal goals. WISDOM breaks them into milestones, tracks progress, and provides encouragement.
acceptance_criteria: User can set goals in natural language
WISDOM proactively checks on goal progress
Goals visible in sidebar and dashboard
features.user_story: As a user with specific goals, I want WISDOM to help me break them down and track my progress.

features.name: Multi-Agent Capabilities
features.description: WISDOM can operate in different modes: Teacher, Researcher, Quiz Master, Code Helper. Each mode has specialized prompts and behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Teacher mode: structured lessons, patience, examples
Researcher mode: search knowledge, provide sources
Quiz Master mode: generate and grade quizzes
Code Helper mode: write, explain, debug code
Seamless switching between modes based on context
Quick action buttons in sidebar to switch modes
features.user_story: As a user, I want WISDOM to switch between being a teacher, a researcher, and a coding assistant based on what I need.

features.name: REST API
features.description: FastAPI REST API for programmatic access. Enables third-party integrations, mobile apps, and chatbot platforms.
acceptance_criteria: POST /chat endpoint with user_id and message
features.user_story: As a developer, I want API access to WISDOM so I can build custom interfaces or integrate it into other apps.

features.name: Achievement & Badge System
features.description: Gamification through achievements. Badges for milestones: First Chat, Level Complete, 7-Day Streak, First Code, etc.
features.user_story: As a learner, I want to earn badges for my achievements so I feel rewarded for my progress.

features.name: Federated Learning Core
features.description: Privacy-preserving community learning. Aggregate anonymous usage patterns to improve WISDOM for everyone. Differential privacy applied.
acceptance_criteria: User can see exactly what would be shared before opting in
Improves prompt templates based on community patterns
No PII ever leaves the device
features.user_story: As a privacy-conscious user, I want to help improve WISDOM for others without revealing my personal data.

features.name: Community Knowledge Base
features.description: Shared, community-curated knowledge base. Users can share useful Q&A pairs anonymously. Community votes on quality.
acceptance_criteria: Top answers used as RAG context
features.user_story: As a community member, I want to share helpful answers so other users benefit from my experience.

features.name: Learning Path (Level 6-7)
features.description: Advanced modules: L6 (Build with AI), L7 (Create AI Tools). Teach users to build applications and eventually their own AI tools.
acceptance_criteria: L6: Build a web app with AI assistance (guided project)
L7: Build and deploy an AI-powered tool
features.user_story: As an advanced user, I want to learn how to build my own AI-powered applications so I become a creator, not just a consumer.

features.name: Profile Export & Import
features.description: Export all user data as JSON. Import to another WISDOM instance. Full data portability — your data, your choice.
acceptance_criteria: Export: profile + progress + memories as JSON
Delete: remove all data (right to be forgotten)
features.user_story: As a user, I want to export my data and move to a different WISDOM instance without losing my progress.

features.name: Voice Input (Speech-to-Text)
features.description: Optional voice input using Whisper or browser Web Speech API. Enables users who can't type easily to interact with WISDOM.
features.user_story: As a user who finds typing difficult, I want to speak to WISDOM so I can interact more naturally.

features.name: Offline Mode
features.description: Core features work without internet when Ollama is available locally. Cached content for learning modules.
acceptance_criteria: Chat works with local Ollama (no internet needed)
User profile and progress stored locally
Clear indicator when in offline mode
features.user_story: As a user with unreliable internet, I want WISDOM to work offline so I can continue learning anytime.

features.name: Plugin System
features.description: Community-built extensions. Plugin interface for adding new capabilities, learning modules, language packs, and integrations.
acceptance_criteria: Sandboxed execution (plugins can't access core data)
features.user_story: As a developer, I want to extend WISDOM with new capabilities without modifying the core codebase.

priority_legend.P0: Must have — MVP cannot launch without this
priority_legend.P1: Should have — Important for core experience
priority_legend.P2: Nice to have — Enhances the product significantly
